title: rubus arcticus var. stellatus
intro: Rubus arcticus var. stellatus, also known as the arctic thimbleberry, is a variant of the thimbleberry plant, a type of shrub belonging to the rose family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus arcticus var. stellatus include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves and roots in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
